final:
module lfsr_6bit (
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    output reg [5:0] lfsr
    );

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (rst) begin
        lfsr <= 6'b000001;
    end else begin
        lfsr <= {lfsr[4:0], lfsr[5] ^ lfsr[4]};
    end
end

endmodule
